grammarNotes: The plural form "Brote" is mainly used for different kinds or loaves of bread.

wordFamilies.note: person who bakes or sells bread

relations.note: used for a loaf of bread

grammarNotes: Often appears with the verb "schreiben" or "einreichen" in formal job contexts.
Commonly used with verbs like "vereinbaren" and "haben".

conversationStarterPacks.title: Bakery Order Starters
conversationStarterPacks.description: Simple openers for ordering politely in a bakery.

phrases.baseText: Guten Tag, ich möchte ein Brot.
phrases.usageNote: Use as a polite first line at the counter.
phrases.commonMistake: Use möchte for a polite request.
